title: Aimep3: Hostile Entity and Pozole Drop
description: Adds a hostile mob based on Aimep3 that drops a unique healing item called "Pozole de Lavadero".
body:
📌 Overview
This mod introduces a custom hostile mob inspired by the content creator Aimep3, designed to challenge players and add a touch of humor to the game. It is a fun, lightweight mod intended for casual playthroughs or content creation.

🧟 Features
Aimep3 Mob:
A custom animated hostile mob that attacks players on sight. It has unique sounds and behavior, and appears naturally in the Overworld (customizeable via configs or future updates).

Pozole de Lavadero:
A healing food item dropped when the Aimep3 mob is defeated. Consuming it restores hunger, making it useful for survival gameplay.

Custom Animation with GeckoLib:
The mob uses advanced animations created using GeckoLib, giving it a more dynamic and lively appearance compared to vanilla mobs.

🧩 Requirements
Forge 1.20.1

GeckoLib (Required for animations)

💡 How It Affects Gameplay
This mod adds an extra layer of challenge and reward. Players will encounter the Aimep3 mob during exploration, and defeating it yields the useful Pozole item. It’s ideal for players who want to spice up their survival experience with custom mobs and unique items, while also offering something humorous and fresh.

⚠️ Important Notes
Make sure you have GeckoLib installed or the mob will not display properly.

Future updates may include spawn configuration, new sound effects, or more mobs based on popular figures.
